session.user: Run pytest on tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py and report results. Just run the command and report what passes/fails.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the specified test file and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on one_shot test file with verbose output

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 ============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 12 items
tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py ..........FF [100%]
=================================== FAILURES =================================== __________________________ test_one_shot_json_output ___________________________
def test_one_shot_json_output() -> None: """Test --json flag emits structured JSON to stdout.""" > runner = CliRunner(mix_stderr=False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: CliRunner.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'mix_stderr'
tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py:353: TypeError __________________________ test_one_shot_json_dry_run __________________________
def test_one_shot_json_dry_run() -> None: """Test --json with --dry-run emits dry_run JSON.""" > runner = CliRunner(mix_stderr=False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: CliRunner.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'mix_stderr'
tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py:389: TypeError
... [4 lines omitted] ...
FAILED tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py::test_one_shot_json_output - TypeError: CliRunner.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'mix_stderr' FAILED tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py::test_one_shot_json_dry_run - TypeError: CliRunner.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'mix_stderr' ========================= 2 failed, 10 passed in 1.79s =========================
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 2 issues found
**Summary:** 10 passed, 2 failed in 1.79s
**Failures:**
1. **tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py::test_one_shot_json_output** (line 353) - Error: `TypeError: CliRunner.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'mix_stderr'` - Root cause: `CliRunner` from Click is being called with `mix_stderr=False`, which is not a valid parameter for the current version
2. **tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py::test_one_shot_json_dry_run** (line 389) - Error: `TypeError: CliRunner.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'mix_stderr'` - Root cause: Same issue - `CliRunner` doesn't accept `mix_stderr` parameter
Both failures are in JSON-related tests and stem from incorrect Click `CliRunner` API usage.
